summary: A Go-based CLI tool that runs infrastructure assertions, migrates from Goss, and supports a plugin architecture with Kubernetes deployment examples.
concerns: uncommitted changes in progress (9 modified, 1 staged, 1 untracked)
tight coupling between runner and assertion types may hinder extensibility
goss migration logic could become obsolete or require long-term maintenance
kubernetes examples suggest deployment complexity not reflected in CI workflows
suggestions: commit or stash the current working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
define a formal assertion interface to standardize future assertion types like credential_check and GraphQL introspection
add integration tests for the kubernetes examples
document the plugin system to encourage community extensions
